last_item: Band D (Backups): Backups → shadcn. Rebuilt src/views/Backups.tsx. PageHeader actions: .btn/.btn-primary/.btn-danger-ghost + .split-btn/.split-extra group → Buttons (Restore…=destructive; Test/Deep/Full=outline; Back up now=default; busy states compose the raw Spinner via data-icon). Split 'Back up now | Full' → two plain buttons in a flex flex-wrap gap-2 row. Both history tables (BackupTable, RestoreTestTable): .data-table/.table-scroll → Table family; per-row error detail → CellError helper (.cell-error → truncate+text-destructive); .compression/.mono small → text-xs text-muted-foreground / font-mono. RestoreModal: radio inputs → RadioGroup/RadioGroupItem (added via `shadcn add radio-group`); delta checkbox → shadcn Checkbox; datetime + typed-name confirm → Input; fieldset/label chrome → FieldSet/FieldLegend/Field/FieldContent/FieldLabel/FieldDescription; footer Cancel/Restore → Button (outline/destructive), busy composes Spinner. Typed-stanza confirm gate unchanged. Status sub-components (BackupStatusSummary/LocalBackupWarning/RestoreTestStatus/DeepRestoreTestConfirm) already use Callout/Badge/AlertDialog — left intact. Exported RestoreModal + added 3 tests; added a ResizeObserver stub to test/setup.ts (Radix RadioGroup reads it). Dead CSS removed (.split-btn/.split-extra/.cell-error/.compression; .radio dropped from shared .radio,.checkbox — .checkbox kept for Settings/Pooler/Migrate/Alerts).
last_result: green: typecheck, 114 web tests (+3), build, go build (outside sandbox; snap-confine cap_dac_override blocks go in-sandbox). ui-heuristics-reviewer: accepted #1+#2 (confirm field lacked inline error + SR feedback → added FieldError on mismatch + aria-describedby; gate logic unchanged) and #3 ('Back up now' lacked the title its 'Full backup' sibling had → added 'Run an incremental backup'); declined #4 (spinner aria-hidden — matched the accepted bare-InlineSpinner-in-button pattern from Query/RolesDatabases), #5 (datetime max — client-side future-time validation is a behavior change), #6 (CellError tabIndex — not a regression; old .cell-error was also truncate+title, tabIndex on a non-interactive div is its own anti-pattern). Next in band D: Migrate. Still deferred to band E: --info-soft collides with --primary-soft; prune next-themes dep.
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
